title: aesthetic-review
description: Stefan's aesthetic review of a rendered human-facing surface: measured, located findings against an exemplar, with a verdict that drives re-implementation. The owner taste-gate is always final; a measured metric is a correlate of beauty, not taste.

candidate.description: path to the rendered screenshot under review

exemplar.description: path to the owner-approved exemplar the candidate is measured against, or null for absolute-band review

instrument.description: measured backbone (e.g. scripts/stefan-aesthetic-review.py — AIM / Aesthetics-Toolbox QIP / visual-clutter)

genre.description: cartridge/genre band applied (e.g. gacha, dashboard); null until per-genre calibration exists

axis.description: measured axis (balance, mirror_symmetry, rms_contrast, figure_ground, palette_cohesion, phog_self_sim) or band

claim.description: measured shortfall, e.g. 'balance 27.8 is 33% below the exemplar 41.6'

fix.description: located, actionable design direction to close the shortfall

gaps.description: disclosed limits: genre-band mismatch, proxy-not-perceptual, instrument trusts self-reported geometry, learned-calibration deferred
